_cite.reason: 4c: relabel unlabeled workspace-analysis to labeled analysis (l10 §3); every binding sentence judged WORKSPACE_ANALYSIS

prior.content_md:
**WINDOW CLOSING — Submit RFI Comments Before the Deadline**

The Federal Register publication of July 15, 2025 opened a formal public comment (RFI) period for the 2025 NFSP update. *Source: Federal Register / U.S. Department of Transportation, 2025-13219, July 15, 2025.* The comment deadline is stated in the RFI notice itself; because the Federal Register source content was inaccessible to programmatic retrieval at time of generation, the specific comment deadline has not been confirmed from the primary source text. **Research Gap:** Confirm the exact RFI comment deadline directly at https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2025/07/15/2025-13219/national-freight-strategic-plan-2025-update-request-for-information or via https://www.regulations.gov by searching docket number 2025-13219.

Action: Assign a team member or outside government affairs contact to retrieve and calendar the RFI deadline. If the workspace wishes to submit comments (see Section 7 below for strategic rationale), comments must be drafted and submitted before that date. For a freight forwarder operating specialty cargo verticals, failure to engage this window means the 2025 NFSP is written without input from the time-critical, high-value specialty freight sector.

---
